headline: Trump to address nation on Iran war Wednesday night, White House says
summary: President Donald Trump said he expected that U.S. military forces will leave Iran in "two or three weeks."

headline: Warren Buffett says Iran bomb would make nuclear disaster harder to avoid
summary: The Berkshire Hathaway chairman said the growing number of nuclear-armed states has fundamentally altered the global risk landscape.

headline: How Is Kratos Defense Expanding Its C5ISR Business for Growth?
summary: KTOS expands its C5ISR segment with advanced communication, satellite systems and scalable tech to tap rising demand in defense and space markets.

headline: Autonomous ship startup Saronic raises $1.75 billion in race to modernize U.S. military
summary: Saronic's latest funding round more than doubles its valuation to $9.25 billion from the prior fundraising early last year.

headline: General Dynamics: Poised To Benefit From High Volume Of Government Contracts
summary: General Dynamics' 2025 backlog surged 30% to $118B, supporting strong near-term revenue and EPS growth. Read why I rate GD stock a long-term buy.
